description: Tech stack implementation guide - LOCAL OVERRIDE for testing boilerplate integration
warning: This is a LOCAL-ONLY override file. Not part of official governance.

nocode.description: No custom code - configuration and content only
nocode.build_instructions: Provide configuration files, content templates, and setup documentation. No code files.

lowcode.description: Business logic only - extends existing boilerplate
lowcode.build_instructions: Build ONLY business-specific modules that extend the boilerplate. Do NOT rebuild infrastructure.

custom.description: Full custom implementation - build complete application
custom.build_instructions: Build complete application from scratch including all infrastructure.

platform_hosting.deployment_steps: Provide platform configuration and content files

vercel_with_supabase.description: Vercel for frontend/API, Supabase for database

lowcode_integration_pattern.step_1: Claude builds business logic in business/ directory
lowcode_integration_pattern.step_2: Harness copies teebu-saas-platform boilerplate to output
lowcode_integration_pattern.step_4: User runs: npm install && npm run integrate:business && npm start

prompt_injection_template.for_lowcode_stack:
**TECH STACK: LOWCODE - BOILERPLATE INTEGRATION MODE**

You are building BUSINESS LOGIC ONLY for {startup_name}.

The teebu-saas-boilerplate already provides:
- Authentication (signup, login, sessions)
- Payment processing (Stripe, subscriptions)
- Database (PostgreSQL via Supabase)
- Email system (transactional emails)
- UI framework (React, Tailwind)
- API infrastructure (Express, middleware)
- Deployment config (Vercel)

Your job: Build ONLY the business-specific code:
- Domain models (e.g., Horse, Race, BreedingRecord)
- Business services (e.g., RacingDataService)
- Business UI components (e.g., HorseProfile)
- Business config (membership tiers, features)

**DO NOT BUILD:**
- Auth system (boilerplate has it)
- Payment system (boilerplate has it)
- Database setup (boilerplate has it)
- Generic UI components (boilerplate has it)
- Server/API infrastructure (boilerplate has it)
- Deployment scripts (boilerplate has it)

**OUTPUT STRUCTURE:**
business/
  models/       ← Domain entities
  services/     ← Business logic
  components/   ← Business UI
  config/       ← Business config
  README-INTEGRATION.md ← Integration guide
